title: I'm a Counter-Strike fanatic - and the AngryMiao AM Infinity.97 is one of the best gaming mice if tested
summary: It's one of the most responsive, comfortable ultralight mice I've used all year, with a genuinely clever swappable battery system to boot. It's not a mouse without its flaws, though.
caption: output/2026-07-23/i-m-a-counter-strike-fanatic-and-the-angrymiao-am-infinity-97-is-one-o.txt
